code:
sequenceDiagram
    title Docker Security Implementation Sequence
    
    participant Client as Client
    participant Apache as Apache Container
    participant Crowdsec as Crowdsec Agent
    participant Firewall as Firewall Bouncer
    participant PHP as PHP-FPM Container
    participant DB as MariaDB Container
    participant DinD as Docker-in-Docker
    
    Note over Client, DinD: Network Security
    
    Client->>Apache: HTTP/HTTPS Request
    
    %% Crowdsec Security Flow
    Apache->>Crowdsec: Log request for analysis
    Crowdsec->>Crowdsec: Parse and analyze logs
    
    alt Malicious Request Detected
        Crowdsec->>Firewall: Add client IP to blocklist
        Firewall->>Client: Block future requests
        Apache->>Client: Return 403 Forbidden
    else Request Allowed
        Apache->>PHP: Forward request via Unix socket
    end
    
    %% Container Isolation
    Note over Apache, DB: Container Security Isolation
    
    %% User permission security
    Apache->>Apache: Run as non-root user (Infra_RedisCache)
    PHP->>PHP: Run as non-root user (Infra_EtcdCluster)
    DB->>DB: Run with limited privileges
    
    %% Volume permissions
    Note over Apache, DB: Volume Security
    Apache->>Apache: Access socket with specific permissions
    PHP->>PHP: Access socket with specific permissions
    
    %% HTTPS communication
    Client->>Apache: HTTPS Request
    Apache->>Apache: SSL Termination with server.crt/key
    Apache->>PHP: Internal communication over Unix socket
    
    %% Security Headers
    PHP->>Apache: Response with generated content
    Apache->>Apache: Add security headers
    Apache->>Client: Response with security headers
    
    %% DinD Security
    Note over DinD: Docker-in-Docker Security
    DinD->>DinD: Run with privileged mode
    DinD->>DinD: SSH access with authentication

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个Docker安全架构的时序图，展示从Client请求到后端容器的完整安全流程。核心是让Crowdsec Agent在中间做流量分析和拦截，还有Docker-in-Docker的特殊处理。
明白，我先确认一下参与者结构。从左到右应该是：Client → Apache Container → Crowdsec Agent → Firewall Bouncer，然后PHP-FPM和MariaDB作为内部容器，最右边放Docker-in-Docker。这样分层对吗？
对的，但Crowdsec和Firewall Bouncer的关系要理清楚——Crowdsec分析日志后，如果发现恶意请求，会通知Firewall Bouncer去封禁IP，不是直接处理。还有Apache和PHP之间走Unix socket，不要画成HTTP。
好的，我画好了主流程。Client发HTTPS请求到Apache，Apache把日志传给Crowdsec分析。这里我用alt分支：恶意请求走Crowdsec→Firewall Bouncer→封禁Client，正常请求Apache转发给PHP-FPM。
还需要加上容器安全隔离的细节。Apache、PHP-FPM、MariaDB都要标注以non-root用户运行，Apache对应Infra_RedisCache，PHP对应Infra_EtcdCluster。另外MariaDB要强调limited privileges。
已加上。我在Container Security Isolation的note下面画了三个自循环：Apache和PHP标注non-root用户及对应infra组件，MariaDB标注limited privileges。Volume Security部分也补了socket权限控制。
SSL终止的位置要确认一下——Apache做SSL Termination，用server.crt和key，然后和PHP的内部通信走Unix socket。最后PHP返回响应时，Apache要加上security headers再发给Client。
明白了，我调整了：Client-Apache是HTTPS，Apache自循环做SSL Termination，然后Apache-PHP走internal Unix socket。响应链是PHP→Apache（加security headers）→Client。
最后处理Docker-in-Docker，这个比较特殊。它需要privileged模式运行，但SSH访问要有认证机制。单独放在最右边，用个note强调它的安全风险。
完成了。DinD在最右侧，note标注Docker-in-Docker Security，下面两个自循环：privileged mode和SSH with authentication。整个图现在覆盖了Network Security、Container Isolation、Volume Security和DinD Security四层防护。
